one_liner: FanBasis provides a self-serve REST API (with sandbox) secured by a simple x-api-key header for managing checkout sessions, products, subscriptions, and payments in its creator-monetization/ecommerce platform.

auth_methods.notes: Single x-api-key header required on all requests; separate sandbox (qa.dev-fan-basis.com) and production (www.fanbasis.com) base URLs. No OAuth or client ID/secret pairs supported.

self_serve_notes: API key is obtained directly from the FanBasis dashboard with no apparent approval process; a sandbox environment (qa.dev-fan-basis.com) is available for testing, and official SDKs exist for Node, Python, PHP, Ruby, and TypeScript.

api_surface.notes: Public REST API covering checkout sessions, products, customers, subscribers, discount codes, transactions, refunds, and webhook subscriptions. SDKs available for Node, Python, PHP, Ruby, TypeScript, plus dedicated checkout-sdk and checkout-react npm packages.

evidence.supports: Documents x-api-key auth, base URLs for production/sandbox, and REST endpoints for webhooks, products, checkout sessions.
Confirms API key is obtained from FanBasis Dashboard, no OAuth/client-secret, covers checkout sessions, customers, subscribers, discount codes, products, transactions, refunds, webhooks.
Official Checkout SDK for Node/TypeScript initialized with apiKey.
Existing Zapier integration referencing an MCP server hosted at mcp.zapier.com for FanBasis.

flags: MCP server existence is via third-party Zapier MCP host (mcp.zapier.com), not an official FanBasis-maintained MCP server
Pricing/free-tier claims for API access are from a single search snippet and not independently verified against FanBasis's official pricing page
